name: LUDWIG ENTERPRISES, INC.
business: Ludwig Enterprises is an early-stage genomics technology and health company developing products using mRNA-based genetic markers to measure inflammation and detect inflammatory-driven diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, preeclampsia, cancer, and long COVID. The company has no current products or revenues and plans to market a proprietary mRNA genetic program by the second quarter of 2026. It intends to serve both business-to-consumer (B2C) and business-to-business (B2B) channels.

exposures.sentence: The Company is at the forefront of this new era of medicine with development of products that will embody our proprietary mRNA genomic technology that has the potential of detecting genetic biomarkers for inflammatory driven diseases, including, but not limited to, heart disease, diabetes, preeclampsia, cancer and long COVID.

If the U. S. Food and Drug Administration (the FDA ) were to begin actively regulating our tests, we could incur substantial costs and delays associated with trying to obtain premarket clearance or approval and incur costs associated with complying with post-market controls.

catalysts.event: Begin marketing of proprietary mRNA genetic program
catalysts.sentence: We have several product and service candidates, including our proprietary mRNA genetic program that we intend to begin marketing by the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Begin generating revenues from planned products
catalysts.sentence: We believe that revenues from sales of our planned products will begin during the second or third quarter of 2026, assuming we are able to obtain needed funding, of which there is no assurance.
